description: ZSCORE returns null for non-existing key

description: ZCARD returns 0 after last member removed

description: ZINCRBY adds increment to existing score

description: ZCOUNT with exclusive bounds excludes endpoints

description: ZCOUNT with infinite bounds covers all members

description: ZREVRANGEBYSCORE returns in descending score order

description: ZRANDMEMBER with count returns array of members
